text: I see you when I sleep
Walking on the clouds
Your galaxies they speak
They say it all works out
And when the sun does cool
We trust the moon will rise
There's no gravity in love
But I've fallen many times
And I'll be a fool for a lover who holds my heart
And I've been misused by a lover who holds my heart
They say it's fantasy
But we are more than words
At times I almost see
The things that I have heard
And all this up and down
Keeps me awake at night
But when your not around
It hurts me more than life
And I'll be a fool for a lover who holds my heart
And I've been misused but I broke him right from the start
And I've been confused cuz his love could fill reservoirs
So please let's take two
Cuz our love deserves a restart
And I'll be a fool for a lover who holds my heart
And I've been misused but I broke him right from the start
Yeahhhh
I'm a fool for you
